Replacing this failed program is another carefully prepared to begin when the next cop is ruthlessly murdered. Enter Alex Murphy, family man. Executed on his first day on the job by the psychotic mobile of criminals led by Clarence Boddicker. Alex will be reborn as he's placed inside an indestructible cybernetic body with enhanced reflexes, strength and digital capabilities. But when he quickly uncovers the ties of corruption between Boddicker and the head of the ocp, Dick Jones, he will have to override his own programming if he's going to ensure that the freedom of self determination will be part of his new life as the hero of the people.
